text: The solitude of these bright and polished corridors fills me with a quiet anticipation. In this sterile, structured space, my mind drifts toward inquiry—a laboratory for thought. Moving into the vibrant R+D exhibit awakens my curiosity. Surrounded by the language of research and development, I feel energized and inspired by the intersection of humanity and intelligence, imagination and machinery. Here, I am both observer and participant in the unfolding dialogue between present certainties and unknown futures.
